text:
In the first image, observing from outside a glass-walled classroom, I feel like an outsider peering in on the rituals of learning—wondering whether true understanding flows more freely inside or out here in the hallway. There’s a slight sense of longing to join, tempered by curiosity.

In the second image, the vibrant wall filled with text and technology devoted to R+D (Research and Development) sparks a sense of excitement and inquiry. Here, I feel invigorated, reminded that human curiosity endlessly transforms the world. This place seems charged with the energy of creative minds, making me both hopeful and thoughtful about future possibilities.
